characters.appearance: Young woman with a slim build and light complexion. She has long, wavy brown hair.
characters.wardrobe: White long-sleeve top and loose olive green cargo pants.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: मैंने पुराने तरीके छोड़ कर Supernova try किया। [I left old methods and tried Supernova.]
Unknown speaker says: सच में, मेरा confidence एकदम बढ़ गया। [Really, my confidence completely increased.]
Unknown speaker says: कुछ ही दिनों में, I was introducing myself in English. [In a few days, I was introducing myself in English.]
Unknown speaker says: और अब... [And now...]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable success story of finding a better way to learn English.
- Establishes the core benefit: moving from hesitation to confident real-world speaking.
- Sets a warm, encouraging tone that feels like advice from a friend.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
I switched to Supernova for my English.
I feel so much more confident!
In a few days, I was introducing myself in English.
In a few weeks, I cracked my job interview.
Practicing with an AI tutor actually helps you speak without translating in your head.
I started the app recently and today I'm speaking fluently.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: पहले office में बात करने से डर लगता था। [Earlier I used to be scared to talk in the office.]
Unknown speaker says: Words याद थे, पर मुँह से निकलते नहीं थे। [I remembered the words, but they wouldn't come out of my mouth.]
Unknown speaker says: But not anymore! [But not anymore!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Contrasts ineffective traditional learning with Supernova's practical, speaking-first approach.
- Highlights common pain points for Indian professionals, like translating in the head and office hesitation.
- Shows clear, relatable benefits of using the app.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
[Old Methods]
X Memorizing grammar rules
X Feeling shy in front of colleagues
X Translating in your head
[Supernova App]
✓ Responding smoothly without overthinking
✓ Speaking confidently in interviews
✓ Real-life daily speaking practice

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: सिर्फ पढ़ने से English बोलना नहीं आता, practice करने से आता है। [You don't learn to speak English just by reading, you learn by practicing.]
Unknown speaker says: Supernova के साथ रोज़ बोलो, and see the difference! [Speak daily with Supernova, and see the difference!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the core philosophy: speaking requires actual speaking practice, not just reading.
- Introduces the AI tutor feature as the practical solution.
- Ends with a strong, emotional payoff and a subtle call to action.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text: Nobody tells you that just reading English won't help you speak it. Memorizing grammar rules won't help you in real-life office meetings. If you don't actually practice speaking out loud, you'll always hesitate. That's why Supernova focuses on daily speaking practice with a friendly AI tutor. I started a few months ago and today I speak with confidence. I just wish I had found it sooner!
